Alyx Frey
Alyx by Lopata Four

Books

  • A Feast for Crows (appendix)

Alyx Frey is the only daughter of Symond Frey, the seventh son of Lord Walder Frey, and Betharios of Braavos.[2]

Contents

  • 1 Appearance
  • 2 Recent Events
    • 2.1 A Storm of Swords
  • 3 Family
  • 4 References

Appearance[ ]

Catelyn Stark considers Alyx to be one of the more nubile Frey maidens.[3]

Recent Events[ ]

A Storm of Swords[ ]

Alyx is one of the Frey women presented to Robb Stark when he arrives at the Twins for Lord Edmure Tully's wedding to Lady Roslin Frey.[4] During the wedding feast Alyx is seated between Robb Stark and Robin Flint. She later dances with Robin.[3]
